title: Register a car successfully
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can save a new car record and see success feedback after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control to open car registration
Fill in the brand field with a valid brand name
Fill in the model field with a valid model name
Fill in the year field with a valid year
Submit the car registration form
Verify success feedback is visible
Verify the saved car record is available in the authenticated car flow

title: Sign out and return to the login screen
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can sign out from home and return to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Sign out from the home screen
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify protected home content is no longer shown

title: Sign in successfully and view the authenticated home screen
description: This verifies that an existing user can sign in and see the authenticated home screen with their current account email.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the home screen is displayed
Verify the current account email is visible

title: Navigate from home to car registration and back to login
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open car registration from home, return with Voltar, and sign out to reach the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control to open car registration
Click the back control on the car registration screen
Click the sign out control
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify authenticated navigation is no longer available

title: Save a new car successfully
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can submit brand, model, and year and see success feedback after the car is saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the car registration screen from home
Fill in the brand field with a valid car brand
Fill in the model field with a valid car model
Fill in the year field with a valid year
Submit the car registration form
Verify success feedback is visible
Verify the car registration was saved

title: Create a new account successfully
description: This verifies that a new user can complete signup and is returned to the login screen after account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a strong password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the signup form
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the new account can return to the login flow

title: Create an account and reach the login screen
description: This test verifies that a new user can sign up successfully and return to the login screen afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the signup form
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the new account can proceed to sign in

title: View saved car details in the listing
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can see saved car cards with the expected details in the listing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control to open car registration
Fill in the brand field with a valid brand name
Fill in the model field with a valid model name
Fill in the year field with a valid year
Submit the car registration form
Click the navigation control to open car listing
Verify the saved car is displayed in the listing
Verify the creator email and creation date are visible

title: View an empty car listing
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open the car listing and see an empty state when no cars are available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control to open car listing
Verify the car listing screen is displayed
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that signing in with invalid credentials is blocked and the user stays on the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with a wrong password
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation alert is visible
Verify the login screen remains available

title: Keep required car fields from submitting when incomplete
description: This test verifies that leaving required car fields blank prevents submission and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the car registration screen from home
Leave one or more required car fields blank
Submit the car registration form
Verify a validation alert is visible
Verify the car is not saved

title: Require car registration fields before saving
description: This verifies that missing required car fields block submission and no car is saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control to open car registration
Submit the car registration form
Verify car validation alerts are visible
Verify success feedback is not visible

title: Go back to home from car registration
description: This test verifies that a signed-in user can use Voltar on the car registration screen to return to home.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the car registration screen from home
Return to the home screen
Verify the authenticated home screen is displayed

title: Reject a weak password during signup
description: This verifies that signup with a weak password is blocked and the account is not created.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a weak password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the signup form
Verify a password validation alert is visible
Verify the signup form remains available

title: Reject an invalid email during signup
description: This verifies that signup with an invalid email is blocked and the user remains on the signup form.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with a strong password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same password
Submit the signup form
Verify an email validation alert is visible
Verify the signup form remains available

title: Reject mismatched password confirmation during signup
description: This verifies that signup is blocked when the password confirmation does not match the password.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a strong password
Fill in the password confirmation field with a different password
Submit the signup form
Verify a password confirmation validation alert is visible
Verify the signup form remains available

title: Show validation when signup fields are missing
description: This verifies that submitting signup with missing required fields prevents account creation and shows validation alerts.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Submit the signup form
Verify validation alerts are visible
Verify the signup form remains available

title: Require login fields before sign in
description: This verifies that submitting the login form without credentials is blocked by validation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the login form
Verify validation alerts are visible
Verify the login screen remains available
